title: Crisp Citrus Mediterranean Cabbage Salad
description: A bright, crunchy salad featuring shredded napa cabbage, citrus segments, and a zesty olive oil dressing-perfect for soothing a hangover and satisfying a Mediterranean craving.

ingredients.name: Orange
ingredients.notes: use a citrus zester to incorporate zest

ingredients.name: Honey
ingredients.notes: opt for raw or local brand

instructions: Wash all produce thoroughly and pat dry.
Shred the napa cabbage finely using a sharp knife or mandoline. Place in a large bowl.
Add the orange segments, diced cucumber, halved cherry tomatoes, and chopped parsley to the bowl.
In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, honey, smoked paprika, oregano, salt, and pepper until the honey is fully dissolved. (Use a whisk to ensure a smooth, emulsified dressing.)
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently to coat all ingredients evenly.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed—add a splash more lemon juice or honey for extra brightness.
Serve the salad immediately, or refrigerate for up to 2 hours for a cooler finish.
